summary: Phase 2 Payment Mediation Testing - Flexible Commission & Guardrails. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working correctly.

issues: React warning: 'tr cannot be a child of span' - cosmetic hydration warning, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Flexible commission logic working: uses venue's negotiated_commission_percent or fallback to DEFAULT_COMMISSION_RATE (10%)
Advance amount guardrails working: min 10%, max 50% validation in create_payment_order
Email notifications implemented via send_payment_link_notification() and send_payment_released_notification()
Commission settings retrieval from venue via get_venue_commission_settings() helper
seed_data_creation: Test payments already exist from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Payment Mediation features verified. Key implementations: 1) Advance guardrails (10% min, 50% max) in /api/payments/create-order. 2) Flexible commission via get_venue_commission_settings() - uses venue.negotiated_commission_percent or 10% default. 3) Email notifications via Resend (gracefully skips if API key not set). Frontend shows commission breakdown in Admin Payments page and RM Lead Detail sidebar.

backend_advance_guardrails.below_minimum_5_percent: PASS - Returns 400 error with message about 10% minimum
backend_advance_guardrails.above_maximum_60_percent: PASS - Returns 400 error with message about 50% maximum
backend_advance_guardrails.valid_advance_20_percent: PASS - Creates payment with correct commission breakdown

backend_commission_logic.default_commission_rate: PASS - Uses 10% when venue has no negotiated rate
backend_commission_logic.commission_calculation: PASS - Commission amount calculated correctly as advance * rate%

backend_notifications.payment_released_notification: PASS - send_payment_released_notification() sends email to venue owner

frontend_admin_payments.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Total Collected, BMV Commission (10%), Pending Release, Released to Venues
frontend_admin_payments.commission_column: PASS - Table shows BMV COMMISSION column with % rate
frontend_admin_payments.status_filter: PASS - Dropdown filter for payment status

frontend_rm_lead_detail.advance_payment_section: PASS - Shows Payment Status badge, Advance Amount, Commission breakdown
frontend_rm_lead_detail.commission_display: PASS - Shows BMV Commission (10%) with calculated amount
frontend_rm_lead_detail.net_to_venue: PASS - Displays net amount after commission

mocked_apis.razorpay_order_creation: MOCKED - Test mode generates mock order_id like order_xxx
mocked_apis.razorpay_payment_verification: MOCKED - Test mode skips signature verification
mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCKED - Skips if RESEND_API_KEY not set, gracefully fails
